evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Maintain data quality and documentation standards
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals (data quality, documentation standards, medallion architecture) are present with no velocity/speed language anywhere in the JD.
evidence.domain_risk: Design and build scalable data products for reports and dashboards
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Salary packaging/employee benefits business context, but the JD language itself is generic internal data-team framing with no explicit financial reporting or regulatory language.
evidence.data_team_maturity: join their Enterprise Data team, focusing on building scalable data products using modern technologies
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named Enterprise Data team and use of medallion architecture indicate an established, growing data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Hands-on Databricks/Snowflake experience with medallion architecture
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tool and architecture terms (Databricks, Snowflake, medallion architecture) give a concrete picture of the technical work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Design and build scalable data products for reports and dashboards
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centres on building internal data products and analytics-ready datasets for reports/dashboards rather than a specific external commercial or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Partner with business and technical stakeholders on requirements
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The framing is scoped-work delivery — partnering on requirements and interpreting business needs into models — without direction-setting or ownership verbs.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool or AI infrastructure mention appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.testing_framing: Maintain data quality and documentation standards
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality maintenance is named as an owned responsibility with an explicit ownership verb ("maintain"), placing it as responsibility rather than tool_listed.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed in delivery and capability terms with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and build scalable data products for reports and dashboards
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The JD mixes building new scalable data products with maintaining data quality and documentation for the existing Enterprise Data team.
